Note 113 (NIRIF routing) is only valid in real life when EGD201F/G danger area is active above FL145 AND M17/Q63 VATRY is unavailable. On Vatsim, danger areas are not used, so this route is effectively never available. Rather than remove the route (which causes ATC/pilot conflicts), it is coded as FL305 only, overnight/weekend windows, to make it practically unusable while remaining technically present in the SRD.

MEDOG DCT VATRY/LANON DEP EGLL... this routeing is not available when activity is promulgated in North Wales MTA South Low

NEBIN/DOGAL via SLANY - This routeing is only available when activity is promulgated in the AUP/UUP for North Wales MTA South/D201 complex at the filed FL. If no activity is promulgated, traffic to NEBIN may route via BAKUR and traffic to DOGAL may route via VATRY (or VATRY/BAKUR if departing London Group/Farnborough Group/EGHH/HI).
NEBIN via BAKUR is allowed unless military activity for North Wales MTA South/D201 complex at the filed FL. If activity is promulgated, traffic to NEBIN may route via SLANY.

DOGAL via VATRY - This routeing is only available when there is no activity promulgated in the AUP/UUP for North Wales MTA South/D201 complex at the filed FL. If activity is promulgated, traffic to DOGAL may route via SLANY. London Group/Farnborough Group/EGHH/EGHI departures may also use BAKUR.
Military route, generally available via certain exit points shown in SRD unless activity in north wales at filed flight levels
VENER via VATRY is allowed unless military activity for North Wales MTA South/D201 complex at the filed FL. If activity is promulgated, traffic to VENER may route via BAKUR.
VENER via LIPGO is allowed unless military activity for North Wales MTA South/D201 complex at the filed FL. If activity is promulgated, traffic to VENER may route via VATRY.

LTMA deps to RESNO/ETARI/PIKIL via VATRY is allowed if no northern Wales military activity at filed flight levels.  If activity is promulgated, traffic to VENER may route via BAKUR (or LIPGO if D201F/G are active). Traffic departing London Group/Farnborough Group/EGHH/EGHI to RESNO/ETARI/PIKIL may route via BAKUR.
